title: Direct Proof Construction
description: Construct direct logical proof of statement
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start: Define Statement to Prove (P -> Q)] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1["Understand the Statement: Identify P (Hypothesis) and Q (Conclusion)"] style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1["Assume P is True"] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1["Start with Known Facts/Axioms/Theorems related to P"] style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 E1["Apply Logical Deductions/Inference Rules"] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1["Intermediate Statement 1"] style F1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff G1["Apply Logical Deductions/Inference Rules"] style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1["Intermediate Statement 2"] style H1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff I1["...Apply Logical Deductions/Inference Rules..."] style I1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1["Intermediate Statement N"] style J1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff K1["Does Intermediate Statement N directly imply Q?"] style K1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 L1["Yes"] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1["Q is True (Conclusion)"] style M1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff N1[End: Proof Complete (P -> Q is True)] style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff O1["No"] style O1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff P1["Refine Deductions/Apply different Inference Rules/Use related Facts"] style P1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff Q1["Are you stuck/unable to make progress after multiple attempts?"] style Q1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 R1["Yes"] style R1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff S1["Re-examine your assumptions, theorems, or definitions. Consider different proof methods"] style S1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff T1["Proof Failed (Try a different approach, the statement may be false)"] style T1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff U1["No"] style U1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff A1 --> B1 B1 --> C1 C1 --> D1 D1 --> E1 E1 --> F1 F1 --> G1 G1 --> H1 H1 --> I1 I1 --> J1 J1 --> K1 K1 -- "Yes" --> L1 L1 --> M1 M1 --> N1 K1 -- "No" --> O1 O1 --> P1 P1 --> Q1 Q1 -- "Yes" --> S1 S1 --> T1 Q1 -- "No" --> E1
entities: Start: Define Statement to Prove (P -> Q)
"Understand the Statement: Identify P (Hypothesis) and Q (Conclusion)"
"Start with Known Facts/Axioms/Theorems related to P"
"Does Intermediate Statement N directly imply Q?"
End: Proof Complete (P -> Q is True)
"Refine Deductions/Apply different Inference Rules/Use related Facts"
"Are you stuck/unable to make progress after multiple attempts?"
"Re-examine your assumptions, theorems, or definitions. Consider different proof methods"
"Proof Failed (Try a different approach, the statement may be false)"
source_text: Source information to be added - please specify the book, paper, or reference material used by the LLM to generate this flowchart.
